description: Ralph Loop unified state file with enhanced 12-tool validation

repo.notes: 2nd consecutive success! 9 OK + 1 content-triggered + 2 Windows-skipped = 12/12 effective. Total findings: 615.

image.notes: Image mode only requires trivy+syft for container scanning

security.notes: Force re-audit 2026-02-04 session 3. CWE-78: 1 shell=True (tool_checker.py:973) with nosec B602 - commands from hardcoded REMEDIATION_COMMANDS dict. CWE-79: _escape_html in simple_html_reporter, json.dumps+tag escaping in html_reporter. CWE-89: 46+ parameterized queries verified, 6 dynamic WHERE with nosec B608. CWE-22: validate_path_within_base, sanitize_path_component in 10 files. CWE-502: no pickle/eval/exec/yaml.load. CWE-400: 443 timeout= occurrences across 53 files. 31 nosec comments all justified.

core.notes: Force re-audit 2026-02-04 session 3. 124 passed, 3 skipped. All tests pass.

cli.notes: Force re-audit 2026-02-04 session 3. 1517 passed, 2 skipped. Fixed TASK-048/049: test_all_tools_ready, test_yes_mode_continues_with_missing, test_tool_with_startup_crash - missing MockToolStatusSummary mocks for get_tool_summary().

adapters.notes: Force re-audit 2026-02-04 session 3. 1886 passed, 92% coverage. All 29 adapters consistent: safe_load_json/ndjson_file, normalize_severity/map_tool_severity. checkov_adapter.py handles v3.2+ array format. horusec_adapter.py handles v2.8+ nested structure.

reporters.notes: Force re-audit 2026-02-04 session 3. 392 passed, 1 skipped, 95% coverage. XSS protected: _escape_html in simple_html_reporter, json.dumps with tag escaping in html_reporter. CSV injection: low risk (internal data). SARIF schema compliant.

wizard.notes: Force re-audit 2026-02-04 session 3. All wizard test files: 755 passed, 1 skipped. All tests passing.
